title: relay store: PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON never set; no schema FK constraints
description: relay/src/store.rs never executes PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON, so SQLite's FK enforcement is disabled. Additionally, the schema has no FOREIGN KEY declarations at all: group_members.group_id does not reference groups, offline_queue.pub_id does not reference users, key_packages.pub_id does not reference users, group_members.pub_id does not reference users. Deleting a group does not cascade-delete group_members by schema; it only works because delete_group() manually does both. Fix: (1) add PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON in Store::new() after pool creation; (2) add FOREIGN KEY constraints to the schema in the next migration.
